title: Enchantment Descriptions Compat
description: Adds enchantment descriptions for modded enchantments that are missing them!
body:
**Description:**
This resourcepack adds enchantment descriptions to modded enchantments that are missing them for compatability with the Enchantment Descriptions mod, this pack works on Forge, Fabric and Neoforge on all versions and on all versions of minecraft! (keep in mind some of the supported mods don't have have their own built in enchantment description compat in older versions but do in newer versions)


**Curseforge:** [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enchantment-descriptions-compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enchantment-descriptions-compat)

**Supported Mods:**
- Ars Additons
- Spawners Plus
- Cardiac 
- Clutter
- Wall Jump
- Hybrid Aquatic
- Endless Biomes
- Tough as Nails
- Deeper and Darker
- Origins: Accessabilities
- Deep Aether
- Stalwart Dungeons
